releases.description: Backported security + stability fixes for Next.js 16.x. Addresses four CVEs patched in the same release.

cves.title: HTTP request smuggling in rewrites — requires app configured with rewrites pointing to external backend; attacker crafts chunked-encoded request
Denial of Service via unbounded request buffering — affects Server Components in versions 16.0.1–16.1.6
Denial of Service in Next.js image handling — LRU disk cache fix

releases.action: Run `npm install next@latest` in all Next.js projects immediately. Fix available as non-major bump.

releases.description: TypeScript 6.0 — the last JavaScript-based release. Microsoft is rebuilding the compiler in Go for 7.0. Ships with 9 default setting changes that will break builds on upgrade without preparation.
breaking_change_details: strict: true is now the default (was false)
Minimum target is now ES2015 — target: 'es5' deprecated
esModuleInterop and allowSyntheticDefaultImports can no longer be set to false
releases.your_stack: All repos are on TypeScript 5.9.3 — major bump available
releases.action: Do NOT upgrade without running migration tool first. Read full migration guide. Plan a dedicated upgrade sprint — this will break builds.

releases.description: Next.js 16.2 — AI-ready create-next-app, browser log forwarding, dev server lock file handling, experimental Agent DevTools, Turbopack Server Fast Refresh, WASM support in Workers, Subresource Integrity for JS files, stable Adapter API.
releases.action: Upgrade from 15.x in the-squeeze and Career-Portfolio. Separate migration guide available at nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/upgrading/version-16.

releases.description: Tailwind CSS 4.2 — new webpack plugin, 4 new color palettes (mauve, olive, mist, taupe), expanded logical property utilities, 3.8x faster recompilation.
releases.your_stack: the-squeeze is on Tailwind 3.4.x — major version gap. Others may already be on v4.
releases.action: the-squeeze needs Tailwind v4 migration (CSS-first config, no more tailwind.config.js). Worth planning but not urgent.

releases.description: Vercel Analytics v2 — breaking API changes. the-squeeze is on v1.6.1.
lucide-react 1.8.0 — active icon library release. Both the-squeeze (0.460.0) and career-launchpad (0.577.0) are on v0.x — major version gap.
releases.action: Check v1 migration notes. Icon names may have changed.

releases.description: React 19.2.5 — React Server Components cycle protection improvements. Minor maintenance release.
releases.action: Upgrade at next dependency refresh cycle. No urgency.

releases.description: Node.js 26 scheduled for April 22, 2026. Last release under the current 2-major-per-year model. Node.js 22 transitions from Active to Maintenance support this month.
releases.action: Watch for release notes on April 22. Not yet available to test.

releases.description: sherpa-onnx 1.12.37 — active development, very frequent minor releases. Patch release yesterday.
releases.action: Monitor if using in SpokenKey. Update at discretion.

releases.description: Vercel platform updates: Workflow SDK now supports custom class serialization via @workflow/serde. Qwen 3.6 Plus and GLM 5.1 added to AI Gateway. Sandbox now supports up to 32 vCPUs / 64 GB RAM for Enterprise. v0 quality regression reported after April 8 update (community tracking).
releases.action: FYI — no action required for current stack.

releases.description: Recharts 3.x is actively maintained. No major release in past 7 days. No action needed.
